expected.notes: Entity did receive foreign gifts but answered 'no' to foreign_capital_transfer, so advisory_form_3520 must not fire despite otherwise fitting the profile.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'advisory_form_3520', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.foreign_capital_transfer eq yes
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
